title: Unique 82686 Foil Happy Banner-2.74 m-Glitz Pink Birthday Party-1 Count (Pack of 1), Multicolour

description: Product Description Welcome guests to your birthday celebration with this Glitz Pink & Silver Happy Birthday Banner. Featuring a charming polka dot design and “Happy Birthday” text, this prismatic foil banner will catch and reflect light, making it ideal to decorate a pink themed birthday party. Hang this celebration banner in an archway or above your party table to add a touch of eye catching style to your celebration. Safety Warning CAUTION: This item is not a toy. Not suitable for use by children. For decorative use only.
